unseven.config.enabled.name: Enabled
unseven.config.bypassWhileControlPressed: If enabled, bypasses all checks made by the mod if the control button is pressed while the message is sent
unseven.config.blockSevenOnly.name: Block Seven Only
unseven.config.blockSevenOnly.descriptio: If enabled and the first word is just "7", the message is sent
unseven.config.ignoreOnlinePlayerNames.d: If enabled and the first word is the ingame name of another player on your server, the message is sent - instead of being blocked (useful when addressing another player whose name starts with a 7)
unseven.config.ignoredWords.name: Ignored Words (Case Insensitive)
unseven.config.ignoredWords.description: List of words that won't be blocked. Any upper case character will be lowercased.
unseven.blocked.message: Blocked possible command "%s" from being sent as a message.
